Video.summary: A former gunslinger survives his own hanging and transforms himself into a mysterious avenger of injustice.
Video.title: The Hanged Man

Video.summary: Lieutenant Jerry Burke (Roy Rogers) is sent to Colorado to track down a troublesome gang. When he finally catches them, he finds out his traitorous brother commands them.
Video.title: Colorado

Video.summary: A singing reporter (Roy Rogers) and a framed man (George "Gabby" Hayes) put a town boss out of business.
Video.title: In Old Cheyenne

Video.summary: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) and his sidekick (Russell Hayden) head for South America to deliver cattle.
Video.title: Law of the Pampas

Video.summary: Led by "The Hawk," a band of Indians terrorizes prospectors in a California valley.
Video.title: Hawk of the Hills

Video.summary: Rex (Rex Allen) and Slim (Slim Pickens) journey to Colorado, where Slim is expecting to claim the estate of the departed Zeke Reynolds, but the will also includes Jacqueline Reynolds and the evil Hurley siblings, and a fight ensues.
Video.title: Colorado Sundown

Video.summary: Texas ranchers blame a homeless drifter (John Barrymore Jr.) for two killers' dirty work.
Video.title: High Lonesome

Video.summary: The Rough Riders (Buck Jones, Tim McCoy, Raymond Hatton) act like strangers to catch a crooked lawyer.
Video.title: The Gunman From Bodie

Video.summary: The Range Busters (Ray Corrigan, Dennis Moore, Max Terhune) track outlaws to their hide-out.
Video.title: Land of Hunted Men

Video.summary: In their first cinematic outing, Red Ryder and his Indian sidekick help a newspaper publisher clean up her town.
Video.title: Ride, Ryder, Ride!

Video.summary: When the Butch Cavendish gang ambushes a group of Texas Rangers, the only surviving ranger dons a mask to protect his identity and swears to bring them to justice.
Video.title: The Legend of the Lone Ranger

Image.alt: The Legend of the Lone Ranger
The Legend of the Lone Ranger
The Legend of the Lone Ranger
The Legend of the Lone Ranger
The Legend of the Lone Ranger

Video.summary: A tough cowboy has a head-to-head confrontation with a gang of outlaws using a rodeo as its base of operations.
Video.title: The Man From Utah

Video.summary: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) helps his friend Johnny (Jay Kirby) find out where rustlers are hiding stolen cattle.
Video.title: Leather Burners

Video.summary: Annie becomes suspicious of Elaine Forbes, the seemingly innocent niece of a recently deceased rancher.
Video.title: Annie and the Lily Maid

Video.summary: Uncle Joe decides to go into the cologne business.
Video.title: Please Buy My Violets

Video.summary: A clumsy fortune-hunter doubles for a notorious gunfighter.
Video.title: The Saga of Clement O'Toole

Video.summary: An outlaw (Myron Healey) poses as a marshal in an attempt to free his brother from jail. With Paul McGuire, Gail Davis.
Video.title: Gunplay

Video.summary: Betty Jo becomes the first female contestant in the horseshoe tournament.
Video.title: The Ringer

Video.summary: After being framed and serving seven years in prison, a bitter man (Harry Lauter) returns to town. With Gail Davis.
Video.title: Annie Calls Her Shots

Video.summary: Annie's childhood sweetheart has become an outlaw, the Waco Kid.
Video.title: The Waco Kid

Video.summary: A contractor agrees to deliver government gun-powder to Geronimo.
Video.title: Tagg Oakley, Sheriff

Video.summary: Hooded vigilantes are involved in a boundary dispute.
Video.title: Mysterious Decoy

Video.summary: Annie (Gail Davis) challenges a mine owner's spoiled rich daughter (Maura Murphy) to a race. With Tom London.
Video.title: The Dude Stagecoach

Video.summary: Kate tries to restore the self confidence of Floyd Smoot after he is jilted by his mail-order sweetheart, by pretending to be in love with him.
Video.title: The Courtship of Floyd Smoot

Video.summary: Curtis breaks the throttle of the Cannonball and blocks the way to Kate's jamboree.
Video.title: Is There a Doctor in the Roundhouse?

Image.alt: Is There a Doctor in the Roundhouse?
Is There a Doctor in the Roundhouse?
Is There a Doctor in the Roundhouse?
Is There a Doctor in the Roundhouse?
Is There a Doctor in the Roundhouse?

Video.summary: Annie, Lofty and Tagg (Gail Davis, Brad Johnson, Jimmy Hawkins) step in when a store owner is killed and his young daughter is left blind. With Judy Nugent.
Video.title: Valley of the Shadows

Video.summary: Pat and Stoney get reports that a man is selling mines to investors that have been salted; the two g-men are determined to discover the truth.
Video.title: Salted Mines

Video.summary: Pat and Stoney investigate how U.S. currency in a bank vault was replaced by counterfeit money.
Video.title: Koniackers

Video.summary: A gold watch is the only clue to a string of murders.
Video.title: Ridge of Ghosts
